title: Vera Bradley Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Vera Bradley reported Q4 consolidated revenue of $84.9 million, down 1.7% year-over-year. Net income was $2.5 million versus a prior year loss of $5.4 million. EPS was $0.09, representing a positive $0.28 swing from prior year. Direct segment revenue was $74.5 million, down 2.6% year-over-year, with 270 basis points sequential improvement from Q3. Indirect segment revenue was $10.4 million, up 4.9% year-over-year, driven by a large wholesale spring collaboration. Comparable sales declined 0.7%, essentially flat after adjusting for winter storm impacts. Gross margin expanded to 47.8% of revenue, up 100 basis points year-over-year. SG&A expense decreased $10.6 million to $37.3 million or 43.9% of revenue. Operating income was $3.6 million or 4.2% margin, compared to an operating loss of $7.3 million in the prior year. Ian Bickley was named permanent CEO and Chairman. FY2027 guidance projects sales of $255-$270 million with at least 40% operating loss improvement. No annual outlet sale is planned for Q1 FY2027.
